sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58538" key="kolabri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολαβρ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n58538.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dance a wild Thracian dance</tr_>, Id.:</sense> </entryFree>
